title: Embed Genie Agent will soon be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
Embedding a Genie Agent as an iframe will be available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled in June 2026.

Embedding a Genie Agent lets business users interact with Genie directly within your internal tools or portals without navigating to Databricks.

See [Embed a Genie Agent in an external app](/aws/en/genie/embed).

ref_links.text: Embed a Genie Agent in an external app
